content.name: Satellite Placer Mk3
content.author: Hary
content.description:
SATELLITE PLACER MK3
Adds a new default ship job that deploys one player-owned satellite in the center of each reachable sector.
:: FEATURES :: • New default job for ships • Respects civilian travel and activity blacklists • Auto-buys satellites for 5,000 credits each • Uses Satellite Mk3 by default • Can switch to vanilla advanced satellites in job settings
:: INFO :: • Requires Satellite Mk3 extension • Savegame will require the Extension once saved with it
:: CREDITS :: ♦ Hary74656 (Nexusmods)/Hary (Steam)
